message:
Improve stealth package test coverage (38% -> 95%)

Add comprehensive tests for stealth delay/countdown functionality:

ComputeDelay tests:
- Negative minSeconds error handling
- Negative maxSeconds error handling
- Nil rng (internal creation)
- Zero range (0, 0)

Wait tests:
- Nil context handling (defaults to Background)
- Negative duration (early return)
- Successful completion with timer
- ShowCountdown progress bar rendering
- Countdown with skip channel
- Countdown with context cancellation
- Default options application

Coverage improvements:
- ComputeDelay: 75% -> 100%
- Wait: 29.4% -> 94.1%
- Total: 38.1% -> 95.2%

Closes caam-o2j7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
